title: Ash Uchida’s Resume
text: Aspiring Software Engineer and Data Analyst

title: Ash Uchida’s Resume
text:
Currently
I’m a student at Brigham Young University - Idaho

Specializing in
Bachelor of Computer Science Minor of Data Science Certificate in Cyber Security


Research interests
Ham radio, Cloud Computing, Databases

title: Ash Uchida’s Resume
text:
Education
Brigham Young University - Idaho September 2024 - now

title: Ash Uchida’s Resume
text:
Awards
2026 2nd Place Hackathon Winner
2024 – 2026 BYU-Idaho Academic Scholarship
2020 – 2024 Huron Heights Secondary School Honor Roll

title: Ash Uchida’s Resume
text:
Projects

HackUSU
Feb 27-28 2026 Built a governed analytics platform (“Sales Dashboard Factory”) in a 17-hour hackathon sprint, earning 2nd place in the Data App Factory challenge. Developed a Streamlit-based application with conversational AI that converts natural language into secure, validated SQL queries using Databricks and Unity Catalog. Collaborated in a fast-paced team environment to design role-based data access, implement SQL guardrails, and deploy a scalable, secure data solution.


Zoom Zone - Personal Project
Dec 2025 – Jan 2026 Developed a full stack scheduling platform that automated 100% of meeting creation by integrating Google Calendar and Zoom APIs to eliminate double booking. Engineered a serverless backend on Vercel using Supabase and secure OAuth token handling, maintaining data persistence for all user bookings. Implemented a Calendly-style booking interface that displays real-time availability and allows users to schedule meetings through a guided flow.


Secretary of the Hackathon Society
Feb 2025 – Nov 2025 Facilitated team alignment by documenting committee discussions and distributing action items to ensure all project goals were met. Coordinated logistics for 35+ teams and 150+ attendees, overseeing the seamless distribution of information and food throughout the 24 hour event. Evaluated participant projects as a judge and managed the creation and presentation of official awards for the closing ceremony.

title: Ash Uchida’s Resume
text:
Experience
Jul 2025 – Sept 2025 Team Member at Target, Queen Creek, Arizona

Consistently reported at 4 AM to unload delivery trucks.
Collaborated with a team to unload and organize high volume shipments within tight 2 hour windows.
Processed and distributed 500+ items of merchandise daily with high accuracy

Aug 2023 – Aug 2024 Team Member at Tim Hortons, Keswick, Ontario, Canada

Collaborated with a team of 10+ to maintain 30 second service speeds in a high volume environment.
erved 200+ customers daily with a 98% order accuracy rate through clear, efficient communication.
Resolved 100% of customer issues on-site using professional conflict resolution to ensure guest satisfaction.

title: My Journey in Data Science Programming
text:
I build secure, data-driven applications that transform complex problems into scalable solutions. My work combines full-stack development, machine learning, and data analysis to create efficient and user-focused systems.
Currently a Computer Science student at BYU-Idaho with a 4.0 GPA.

🎓 BYU-Idaho — 4.0 GPA

🏆 2nd Place Hackathon Winner

💻 Full-Stack & Data Science Projects

title: My Journey in Data Science Programming
text:
Featured Work

Hackathon Winner (2nd Place)
Built a secure analytics platform that converts natural language into validated SQL using AI and Databricks, enabling users to safely query data without writing SQL.


Zoom Zone
Developed a full-stack scheduling platform integrating Google Calendar and Zoom APIs, allowing users to automate meeting creation and avoid scheduling conflicts.

title: My Journey in Data Science Programming
text:
About Me
I’m a Computer Science student with a passion for building applications and working with data. I enjoy creating full-stack projects, exploring machine learning, and solving real-world problems.
Outside of tech, I enjoy snowboarding, painting murals, and staying active outdoors.
